meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap in your SaaS projects with expert user onboarding. Learn to build professional flows using Antigravity and Claude Code as a beginner.
content.answer_block: User onboarding is the bridge between a user landing and finding value. By implementing a structured, feature-led walkthrough using Antigravity for UI components and Claude Code for logic, you transform complex, confusing apps into intuitive experiences, drastically reducing churn and increasing your value as a freelance developer.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks coding, but your clients are ghosting the product. The issue isn't your code; it's the 'SaaS void'—the moment a user logs in and stares at a blank screen, paralyzed by choice. You don't need a computer science degree to fix this; you need a psychological roadmap that guides them to their first 'Aha!' moment.

In this guide, we strip away the bloat. We are leveraging the speed of Antigravity’s component architecture and the raw power of Claude Code to automate professional-grade onboarding. Stop building features and start building experiences that convert.

steps.title: Define the 'Aha!' Moment
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves your app's value. We define this first so the onboarding flow remains laser-focused on getting the user there.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a user journey map for a SaaS app that identifies the primary 'Aha!' moment and lists the 3 essential steps to get a new user there.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze current codebase and suggest the shortest path to the primary value proposition for a new user.'

steps.title: Scaffold the Onboarding UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate a non-intrusive, modal-based tour that highlights your key features without overwhelming the UI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive, clean React onboarding modal component that uses a step-by-step progress indicator and a 'Skip' button.

steps.title: Implement State-Driven Logic
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding tour only triggers once per user using local storage or database flags.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook to manage onboarding state using localStorage to ensure the tour only triggers on the first visit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a useOnboarding hook that checks localStorage and triggers the modal on initial load.'

steps.title: Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Add subtle tooltips to complex UI elements to provide just-in-time education.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a reusable Tooltip component that anchors to specific UI elements and explains their function concisely.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Finalize the integration and test the flow to ensure no friction exists for new sign-ups.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a test script that simulates a new user flow and verifies the onboarding modal appears correctly.
steps.claude_code_command: claude test 'Verify onboarding modal visibility and state persistence'

pro_tips: Never force a tour; always provide an 'Exit' button to respect the user's intelligence.
Use 'Empty States' as onboarding opportunities—when there is no data, show a button that triggers a demo import.
Keep onboarding text under 15 words per slide to prevent cognitive overload.
Track onboarding completion rates as a KPI; if users drop off at step 3, that step is likely too complex.
Personalize the welcome screen with the user's name immediately after sign-up to build instant rapport.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, implement Mixpanel or PostHog to track where your users drop off and iterate based on that data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your hard work go to waste because users don't know how to use it. Implement these patterns, ship faster, and start charging premium rates for your SaaS builds. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
